final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: food photography, editorial food shot
Primary request: close-up hero shot of Japanese tonkotsu ramen with chopsticks lifting noodles, steam rising
Scene/backdrop: shallow depth of field, blurred dark wooden table or restaurant interior
Subject: rich creamy tonkotsu pork bone broth, two slices of chashu pork belly, soft-boiled ajitama egg with runny yolk, nori seaweed sheets, finely chopped green scallions, chopsticks holding glossy wheat noodles
Style/medium: professional food photography, macro food editorial
Composition/framing: tight close-up, 85mm lens equivalent, shallow depth of field, rule of thirds
Lighting/mood: soft diffused side lighting highlighting broth texture and steam, warm and appetizing mood
Color palette: creamy white broth + caramelized chashu pink + golden egg yolk + deep green scallions + dark nori
Materials/textures: silky rich broth surface, tender fatty pork, glossy springy noodles, steam wisps
Constraints: keep the chopsticks actively lifting noodles, visible steam rising from hot broth, appetizing presentation
Avoid: plastic-looking food, artificial colors, cold appearance, cluttered background, watermark
